name: Regretevator Road Trip
description:
🛗 - road trip to Miami!

Same premise as literally every other group bot..! You and the whole gang hang out, except you’re forced to be in a large van with everyone on your way to Miami or some shit for summer vacation. The ride would LITERALLY TAKE 2 DAYS…
